name_en: 【Rogue】New Arrival🌟Puzzle Features a unique geometric line outline for a rectangular shape🆕 This small size version is made of classic calfskin and suede, adorned with a mosaic stripe pattern in specific color schemes*Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld*Removable and adjustable shoulder strap*Zipper closure, calfskin zipper pull*One external zip pocket, one internal slip pocket*Suede lining*Anagram embossed

Dimensions: 24*10.5*16cm
